compiled_state.title: test-batched.sh: test-bug-report-cli-validation.sh and test-bug-report-integration.sh report FAIL intermittently -> pass on targeted rerun
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
During commit workflow Step 1 (test-batched.sh full suite run), test-bug-report-cli-validation.sh and test-bug-report-integration.sh reported FAIL in the batched runner summary (266/266 complete, 264 passed, 2 failed). Both tests pass consistently on targeted rerun (bash tests/scripts/test-bug-report-*.sh) and on clean git stash baseline.

## Expected Behavior
Tests should produce consistent results in batched and targeted execution modes.

## Actual Behavior
Intermittent FAIL in batched runner only. Suspected cause: test environment pollution from earlier tests in the batch or timing-dependent temp file cleanup.

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 3 (INTERMEDIATE). Intermittent false negatives in batched runner — environment pollution suspected.
comments.author: Test
